task_summary: SP23a minimal speech-bubble retry stopped before product edits because mew could not apply the required paired source/test hunk patch through the available work-loop tool shapes.

tests_run.result: inside session #66, source-only preview approval failed with 3 failing tests because paired test updates were not applied
40 passed on the unchanged baseline after rejecting the pending source-only patch
clean after rejecting pending tool #1470; no product diff persisted

proof_artifacts: session #66 reached a plausible source hunk for the speech bubble but source-only approval failed verifier
mew then identified the exact blocker: batch edit_file_hunks is unsupported, while standalone edit_file_hunks can edit only one file
the required safe patch is paired source+test under experiments/mew-ghost, so the operator rejected the unpaired source-only patch
post-rejection git status was clean and the focused pytest baseline passed
notes: Codex did not write product code. This is distinct from issue #25: the patch did not disappear after a green verifier; instead, mew could not express a safe paired multi-file hunk patch through the supported work-session tool shapes.
